title: Themonsterguns
description: Collect powerful weapons and survive against powerful monsters in a chaotic world!
body: This mod adds various elements such as guns, swords, tools, food, backpacks, new effects, biomes, dimensions, mobs, and powerful monsters. Tools such as swords can be obtained by crafting, by destroying blocks called relief supplies, by trading with villagers with new professions who can be employed at the anvil, or by defeating boss mobs, and guns can be obtained by destroying relief supplies, by trading with villagers with new professions, or by defeating boss mobs. This MOD is compatible with version 1.20.1.The prerequisite mod is forge,and GeckoLib.
